001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.Enablement.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.RestUtils.*;
024
025import java.io.*;
026import java.net.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.concurrent.*;
029import java.util.zip.*;
030
031import org.apache.http.*;
032import org.apache.http.client.methods.*;
033import org.apache.http.conn.*;
034import org.apache.http.entity.*;
035import org.apache.http.message.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentType;
038import org.apache.juneau.http.remote.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
041import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.*;
042import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestRequest;
043import org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.*;
044import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
045import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
046
047import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
048
049/**
050 * Mocked {@link RestClient}.
051 *
052 * <p>
053 *    This class is used for performing serverless unit testing of {@link Rest @Rest}-annotated and {@link Remote @Remote}-annotated classes.
054 *
055 * <p>
056 *    The class itself extends from {@link RestClient} providing it with the rich feature set of that API and combines
057 *    it with the Apache HttpClient {@link HttpClientConnection} interface for processing requests.
058 *  The class converts {@link HttpRequest} objects to instances of {@link MockServletRequest} and {@link MockServletResponse} which are passed directly
059 *  to the call handler on the resource class {@link RestContext#execute(Object,HttpServletRequest,HttpServletResponse)}.
060 *  In effect, you're fully testing your REST API as if it were running in a live servlet container, yet not
061 *  actually having to run in a servlet container.
062 *  All aspects of the client and server side code are tested, yet no servlet container is required.  The actual
063 *  over-the-wire transmission is the only aspect being bypassed.
064 *
065 * <p>
066 * The following shows a simple example of invoking a PUT method on a simple REST interface and asserting the correct status code and response body:
067 *
068 * <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
069 * <p class='bjava'>
070 *    <jk>public class</jk> MockTest {
071 *
072 *       <jc>// A simple bean with one field.</jc>
073 *       <jk>public static class</jk> MyBean {
074 *          <jk>public int</jk> <jf>foo</jf> = 1;
075 *       }
076 *
077 *       <jc>// Our REST resource to test.</jc>
078 *       <jc>// Simply echos the response.</jc>
079 *       <ja>@Rest</ja>(
080 *          serializers=Json5Serializer.<jk>class</jk>,
081 *          parsers=JsonParser.<jk>class</jk>
082 *       )
083 *       <jk>public static class</jk> EchoRest {
084 *
085 *          <ja>@RestPut</ja>(
086 *             path=<js>"/echo"</js>
087 *          )
088 *          <jk>public</jk> MyBean echo(<ja>@Content</ja> MyBean <jv>bean</jv>) {
089 *             <jk>return</jk> <jv>bean</jv>;
090 *          }
091 *       }
092 *
093 *       <jc>// Our JUnit test.</jc>
094 *       <ja>@Test</ja>
095 *       <jk>public void</jk> testEcho() <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
096 *
097 *          MyBean <jv>myBean</jv> = <jk>new</jk> MyBean();
098 *
099 *          <jc>// Do a round-trip on the bean through the REST interface</jc>
100 *          <jv>myBean</jv> = MockRestClient
101 *             .<jsm>create</jsm>(EchoRest.<jk>class</jk>)
102 *             .json5()
103 *             .build()
104 *             .put(<js>"/echo"</js>, <jv>myBean</jv>)
105 *             .run()
106 *             .assertStatus().is(200)
107 *             .assertContent().is(<js>"{foo:1}"</js>)
108 *             .getContent().as(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
109 *
110 *          <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(1, <jv>myBean</jv>.<jf>foo</jf>);
111 *       }
112 *    }
113 * </p>
114 * <p>
115 *    Breaking apart the fluent method call above will help you understand how this works.
116 *
117 * <p class='bjava'>
118 *    <ja>@Test</ja>
119 *    <jk>public void</jk> testEcho() <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
120 *
121 *       <jc>// Instantiate our mock client.</jc>
122 *       MockRestClient <jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient
123 *          .<jsm>create</jsm>(EchoRest.<jk>class</jk>)
124 *          .json5()
125 *          .build();
126 *
127 *       <jc>// Create a request.</jc>
128 *       RestRequest <jv>req</jv> = <jv>client</jv>.put(<js>"/echo"</js>, <jv>bean</jv>);
129 *
130 *       <jc>// Execute it (by calling RestCallHandler.service(...) and then returning the response object).</jc>
131 *       RestResponse <jv>res</jv> = <jv>req</jv>.run();
132 *
133 *       <jc>// Run assertion tests on the results.</jc>
134 *       <jv>res</jv>.assertStatus().is(200);
135 *       <jv>res</jv>.assertContent().is(<js>"'foo'"</js>);
136 *
137 *       <jc>// Convert the content of the response to a bean.</jc>
138 *       <jv>bean</jv> = <jv>res</jv>.getContent().as(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
139 *    }
140 * </p>
141 *
142 * <p>
143 *    The <c>create(Object)</c> method can take in either <c>Class</c> objects or pre-instantiated beans.
144 *    The latter is particularly useful for testing Spring beans.
145 *
146 * <p>
147 *    The {@link MockRestRequest} object has convenience methods provided to allow you to set any properties
148 *    directly on the underlying {@link HttpServletRequest} object.  The following example shows how
149 *    this can be used to directly set roles on the request object to perform security testing.
150 *
151 * <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
152 * <p class='bjava'>
153 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(roleGuard=<js>"ADMIN"</js>)
154 *    <jk>public class</jk> A {
155 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>
156 *       <jk>public</jk> String get() {
157 *          <jk>return</jk> <js>"OK"</js>;
158 *       }
159 *    }
160 *
161 *    <ja>@Test</ja>
162 *    <jk>public void</jk> mytest() <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
163 *       MockRestClient <jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient.<jsm>build</jsm>(A.<jk>class</jk>);
164 *
165 *       <jc>// Admin user should get 200, but anyone else should get 403-Unauthorized.</jc>
166 *       <jv>client</jv>.get().roles(<js>"ADMIN"</js>).run().assertStatus().is(200);
167 *       <jv>client</jv>.get().roles(<js>"USER"</js>).run().assertStatus().is(403);
168 *    }
169 * </p>
170 *
171 * <p>
172 *    Debug mode is provided that will cause your HTTP requests and responses to be sent to the console:
173 *
174 * <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
175 * <p class='bjava'>
176 *    MockRestClient <jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient
177 *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(MyRest.<jk>class</jk>)
178 *       .debug()
179 *       .json5()
180 *       .build();
181 * </p>
182 *
183 * <p>
184 *    The class can also be used for testing of {@link Remote @Remote}-annotated interfaces against {@link Rest @Rest}-annotated resources.
185 *
186 * <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
187 * <p class='bjava'>
188 *    <jc>// Our remote resource to test.</jc>
189 *    <ja>@Remote</ja>
190 *    <jk>public interface</jk> MyRemoteInterface {
191 *
192 *       <ja>@RemoteGet</ja>(<js>"/echoQuery"</js>)
193 *       <jk>public int</jk> echoQuery(<ja>@Query</ja>(name=<js>"id"</js>) <jk>int</jk> <jv>id</jv>);
194 *    }
195 *
196 *    <jc>// Our mocked-up REST interface to test against.</jc>
197 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>
198 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyRest {
199 *
200 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(path=<js>"/echoQuery"</js>)
201 *       <jk>public int</jk> echoQuery(<ja>@Query</ja>(<js>"id"</js>) String <jv>id</jv>) {
202 *          <jk>return</jk> <jv>id</jv>;
203 *       }
204 *    }
205 *
206 *    <ja>@Test</ja>
207 *    <jk>public void</jk> testProxy() {
208 *       MyRemoteInterface <jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient
209 *          .create(MyRest.<jk>class</jk>)
210 *          .json()
211 *          .build()
212 *          .getRemote(MyRemoteInterface.<jk>class</jk>);
213 *
214 *       <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(123, <jv>client</jv>.echoQuery(123));
215 *    }
216 * </p>
217 *
218 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
219 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
220 * </ul>
221 *
222 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
223 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestMockBasics">juneau-rest-mock Basics</a>
224 * </ul>
225 */
226@SuppressWarnings({
227   "resource",  // Builders and requests returned to callers; lifecycle managed by the enclosing MockRestClient or test
228   "java:S3740" // Raw Class/Builder types used intentionally for fluent mock client construction where response type is unknown at build time
229})
230public class MockRestClient extends RestClient implements HttpClientConnection {
231
232   /**
233    * Builder class.
234    */
235   public static class Builder extends RestClient.Builder<Builder> implements BeanStoreOverridable<Builder> {
236
237      Object restBean;
238      String contextPath;
239      String servletPath;
240      RestContext restContext;
241      Map<String,String> pathVars;
242      org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore overridingBeanStore;
243
244      /**
245       * No-arg constructor.
246       *
247       * <p>
248       * Provided so that this class can be easily subclassed.
249       */
250      protected Builder() {
251         connectionManager(new MockHttpClientConnectionManager());
252      }
253
254      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
255      public MockRestClient build() {
256         return super.build(MockRestClient.class);
257      }
258
259      /**
260       * Identifies the context path for the REST resource.
261       *
262       * <p>
263       *    This value is used to deconstruct the request URL and set the appropriate URL getters on the {@link HttpServletRequest}
264       *    object correctly.
265       *
266       * <p>
267       *    Should either be a value such as <js>"/foo"</js> or an empty string.
268       *
269       * <p>
270       *    The following fixes are applied to non-conforming strings.
271       * <ul>
272       *    <li><jk>nulls</jk> and <js>"/"</js> are converted to empty strings.
273       *    <li>Trailing slashes are trimmed.
274       *    <li>Leading slash is added if needed.
275       * </ul>
276       *
277       * @param value The context path.
278       * @return This object.
279       */
280      public Builder contextPath(String value) {
281         contextPath = toValidContextPath(value);
282         return this;
283      }
284
285      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
286      public Builder copy() {
287         throw new NoSuchMethodError("Not implemented.");
288      }
289
290      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
291      public Builder debug() {
292         header("Debug", "true");
293         super.debug();
294         return this;
295      }
296
297      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
298      @SuppressWarnings({
299         "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for builder chain
300      })
301      public Builder parsers(java.lang.Class<? extends org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser>...value) {
302         super.parsers(value);
303         return this;
304      }
305
306      /**
307       * Add resolved path variables to this client.
308       *
309       * <p>
310       * Allows you to add resolved parent path variables when performing tests on child resource classes.
311       *
312       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
313       * <p class='bjava'>
314       *    <jc>// A parent class with a path variable.</jc>
315       *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(
316       *       path=<js>"/parent/{foo}"</js>,
317       *       children={
318       *          Child.<jk>class</jk>
319       *       }
320       *    )
321       *    <jk>public class</jk> Parent { ... }
322       *
323       *    <jc>// A child class that uses the parent path variable.</jc>
324       *    <ja>@Rest</ja>
325       *    <jk>public class</jk> Child {
326       *
327       *       <jk>@RestGet</jk>
328       *       <jk>public</jk> String get(<ja>@Path</ja>(<js>"foo"</js>) String <jv>foo</jv>) {
329       *          <jk>return</jk> <jv>foo</jv>;
330       *       }
331       *    }
332       * </p>
333       * <p class='bjava'>
334       *    <jc>// Test the method that uses the parent path variable.</jc>
335       *    MockRestClient
336       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(Child.<jk>class</jk>)
337       *       .json5()
338       *       .pathVars(<js>"foo"</js>,<js>"bar"</js>)
339       *       .build()
340       *       .get(<js>"/"</js>)
341       *       .run()
342       *       .assertStatus().asCode().is(200)
343       *       .assertContent().is(<js>"bar"</js>);
344       * </p>
345       *
346       * <review>Needs review</review>
347       *
348       * @param value The path variables.
349       * @return This object.
350       * @see MockServletRequest#pathVars(Map)
351       */
352      public Builder pathVars(Map<String,String> value) {
353         pathVars = value;
354         return this;
355      }
356
357      /**
358       * Add resolved path variables to this client.
359       *
360       * <p>
361       * Identical to {@link #pathVars(Map)} but allows you to specify as a list of key/value pairs.
362       *
363       * @param pairs The key/value pairs.  Must be an even number of parameters.
364       * @return This object.
365       */
366      public Builder pathVars(String...pairs) {
367         return pathVars(mapb(String.class, String.class).addPairs((Object[])pairs).build());
368      }
369
370      /**
371       * Specifies the {@link Rest}-annotated bean class or instance to test against.
372       *
373       * @param value The {@link Rest}-annotated bean class or instance.
374       * @return This object.
375       */
376      public Builder restBean(Object value) {
377         restBean = value;
378         return this;
379      }
380
381      /**
382       * Specifies the {@link RestContext} created for the REST bean.
383       *
384       * @param value The {@link RestContext} created for the REST bean.
385       * @return This object.
386       */
387      public Builder restContext(RestContext value) {
388         restContext = value;
389         return this;
390      }
391
392      /**
393       * Installs a {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore BeanStore} as the
394       * {@code overridingParent} of the {@link RestContext}'s bean store, so test-time overrides
395       * (e.g. {@code TestBeanStore}) resolve at tier 1 of the lookup chain &mdash; above the
396       * resource's local {@code @Bean} factory entries.
397       *
398       * <p>
399       * Setting this disables the per-resource {@link RestContext} cache for the duration of this
400       * build, so the overlay is not silently shared with a previously-cached instance.
401       *
402       * @param value The override layer. Can be <jk>null</jk> to clear a previously-set value.
403       * @return This object.
404       *
405       * @since 10.0.0
406       */
407      @Override
408      public Builder overridingBeanStore(org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore value) {
409         overridingBeanStore = value;
410         return this;
411      }
412
413      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
414      @SuppressWarnings({
415         "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for builder chain
416      })
417      public Builder serializers(java.lang.Class<? extends org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer>...value) {
418         super.serializers(value);
419         return this;
420      }
421
422      /**
423       * Identifies the servlet path for the REST resource.
424       *
425       * <p>
426       *    This value is used to deconstruct the request URL and set the appropriate URL getters on the {@link HttpServletRequest}
427       *    object correctly.
428       *
429       * <p>
430       *    Should either be a value such as <js>"/foo"</js> or an empty string.
431       *
432       * <p>
433       *    The following fixes are applied to non-conforming strings.
434       * <ul>
435       *    <li><jk>nulls</jk> and <js>"/"</js> are converted to empty strings.
436       *    <li>Trailing slashes are trimmed.
437       *    <li>Leading slash is added if needed.
438       * </ul>
439       *
440       * @param value The context path.
441       * @return This object.
442       */
443      public Builder servletPath(String value) {
444         servletPath = toValidContextPath(value);
445         return this;
446      }
447
448      /**
449       * Suppress logging on this client.
450       *
451       * @return This object.
452       */
453      public Builder suppressLogging() {
454         return logRequests(DetailLevel.NONE, null, null);
455      }
456
457
458   }
459
460   private static Map<Class<?>,RestContext> restContexts = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
461
462   /**
463    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with no registered serializer or parser.
464    *
465    * <p>
466    * Equivalent to calling:
467    * <p class='bjava'>
468    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).build();
469    * </p>
470    *
471    * @param impl
472    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
473    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
474    * @return A new builder.
475    */
476   public static MockRestClient build(Object impl) {
477      return create(impl).build();
478   }
479
480   /**
481    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with JSON marshalling support.
482    *
483    * <p>
484    * Equivalent to calling:
485    * <p class='bjava'>
486    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).json().build();
487    * </p>
488    *
489    * @param impl
490    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
491    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
492    * @return A new builder.
493    */
494   public static MockRestClient buildJson(Object impl) {
495      return create(impl).json().build();
496   }
497
498   /**
499    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with Simplified-JSON marshalling support.
500    *
501    * <p>
502    * Equivalent to calling:
503    * <p class='bjava'>
504    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).json().build();
505    * </p>
506    *
507    * @param impl
508    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
509    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
510    * @return A new builder.
511    */
512   public static MockRestClient buildJson5(Object impl) {
513      return create(impl).json5().build();
514   }
515
516   /**
517    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with Simplified-JSON marshalling support.
518    *
519    * <p>
520    * Same as {@link #buildJson5(Object)} but HTTP 400+ codes don't trigger {@link RestCallException RestCallExceptions}.
521    *
522    * <p>
523    * Equivalent to calling:
524    * <p class='bjava'>
525    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).json().ignoreErrors().build();
526    * </p>
527    *
528    * @param impl
529    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
530    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
531    * @return A new builder.
532    */
533   public static MockRestClient buildJson5Lax(Object impl) {
534      return create(impl).json5().ignoreErrors().noTrace().build();
535   }
536
537   /**
538    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with JSON marshalling support.
539    *
540    * <p>
541    * Same as {@link #buildJson(Object)} but HTTP 400+ codes don't trigger {@link RestCallException RestCallExceptions}.
542    *
543    * <p>
544    * Equivalent to calling:
545    * <p class='bjava'>
546    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).json().ignoreErrors().build();
547    * </p>
548    *
549    * @param impl
550    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
551    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
552    * @return A new builder.
553    */
554   public static MockRestClient buildJsonLax(Object impl) {
555      return create(impl).json().ignoreErrors().noTrace().build();
556   }
557
558   /**
559    * Creates a new {@link RestClient} with no registered serializer or parser.
560    *
561    * <p>
562    * Same as {@link #build(Object)} but HTTP 400+ codes don't trigger {@link RestCallException RestCallExceptions}.
563    *
564    * <p>
565    * Equivalent to calling:
566    * <p class='bjava'>
567    *    MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>impl</jv>).ignoreErrors().noTrace().build();
568    * </p>
569    *
570    * @param impl
571    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
572    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
573    * @return A new builder.
574    */
575   public static MockRestClient buildLax(Object impl) {
576      return create(impl).ignoreErrors().noTrace().build();
577   }
578
579   /**
580    * Creates a new {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestClient.Builder}configured with the specified REST implementation bean or bean class.
581    *
582    * @param impl
583    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
584    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
585    * @return A new builder.
586    */
587   public static Builder create(Object impl) {
588      return new Builder().restBean(impl);
589   }
590
591   /**
592    * Creates a new {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestClient.Builder}configured with the specified REST implementation bean or bean class.
593    *
594    * <p>
595    * Same as {@link #create(Object)} but HTTP 400+ codes don't trigger {@link RestCallException RestCallExceptions}.
596    *
597    * @param impl
598    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link Rest @Rest}.
599    *    <br>If a class, it must have a no-arg constructor.
600    * @return A new builder.
601    */
602   public static Builder createLax(Object impl) {
603      return new Builder().restBean(impl).ignoreErrors().noTrace();
604   }
605
606   private static Builder preInit(Builder builder) {
607      try {
608         var restBean = builder.restBean;
609         var contextPath = builder.contextPath;
610         var servletPath = builder.servletPath;
611         var overlay = builder.overridingBeanStore;
612
613         var c = restBean instanceof Class restBean2 ? (Class<?>)restBean2 : restBean.getClass();
614         RestContext restBeanCtx;
615         if (overlay == null && restContexts.containsKey(c)) {
616            restBeanCtx = restContexts.get(c);
617         } else {
618            var isClass = restBean instanceof Class;
619            var o = isClass ? ((Class<?>)restBean).getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance() : restBean;
620            restBeanCtx = new RestContext(new RestContext.Args(o.getClass(), null, null, () -> o, "", bs -> {
621               bs.addBean(Enablement.class, CONDITIONAL);
622               bs.addBeanType(CallLogger.class, BasicTestCallLogger.class);
623            }, overlay, null, RestContext.ContextKind.ROOT)).postInit().postInitChildFirst();
624            if (overlay == null)
625               restContexts.put(c, restBeanCtx);
626         }
627         builder.restContext(restBeanCtx);
628
629         if (servletPath == null)
630            servletPath = toValidContextPath(restBeanCtx.getFullPath());
631
632         final var suffix = emptyIfNull(contextPath) + emptyIfNull(servletPath);
633         final var existingSupplier = builder.getRootUrlSupplier();
634         if (existingSupplier != null) {
635            // Compose a new supplier that appends the fixed path suffix to whatever the original supplier returns.
636            builder.rootUrl(() -> existingSupplier.get() + suffix);
637         } else {
638            builder.rootUrl("http://localhost" + suffix);
639         }
640
641         builder.servletPath = servletPath;
642         return builder;
643      } catch (Exception e) {
644         throw new ConfigException(e, "Could not initialize MockRestClient");
645      }
646   }
647
648   private final RestContext restContext;
649   private final Object restObject;
650   private final String contextPath;
651   private final String servletPath;
652
653   private final Map<String,String> pathVars;
654   private final ThreadLocal<HttpRequest> rreq = new ThreadLocal<>();
655   private final ThreadLocal<MockRestResponse> rres = new ThreadLocal<>();
656   private final ThreadLocal<MockServletRequest> sreq = new ThreadLocal<>();
657
658   private final ThreadLocal<MockServletResponse> sres = new ThreadLocal<>();
659
660   /**
661    * Constructor.
662    *
663    * @param builder
664    *    The builder for this object.
665    */
666   public MockRestClient(Builder builder) {
667      super(preInit(builder));
668      restContext = builder.restContext;
669      contextPath = nn(builder.contextPath) ? builder.contextPath : "";
670      servletPath = nn(builder.servletPath) ? builder.servletPath : "";
671      pathVars = nn(builder.pathVars) ? builder.pathVars : emptyMap();
672      restObject = restContext.getResource();
673
674      HttpClientConnectionManager ccm = getHttpClientConnectionManager();
675      if (ccm instanceof MockHttpClientConnectionManager ccm2)
676         ccm2.init(this);
677   }
678
679   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
680   public MockRestRequest callback(String callString) throws RestCallException {
681      return (MockRestRequest)super.callback(callString);
682   }
683
684   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
685   public void close() throws IOException {
686      // Don't call super.close() because it will close the client.
687      rreq.remove();
688      rres.remove();
689      sreq.remove();
690      sres.remove();
691   }
692
693   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
694   public MockRestRequest delete(Object url) throws RestCallException {
695      return (MockRestRequest)super.delete(url);
696   }
697
698   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
699   public void flush() throws IOException {
700      // No-op: Mock implementation - full functionality not required
701   }
702
703   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
704   public MockRestRequest formPost(Object url) throws RestCallException {
705      return (MockRestRequest)super.formPost(url);
706   }
707
708   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
709   public MockRestRequest formPost(Object url, Object body) throws RestCallException {
710      return (MockRestRequest)super.formPost(url, body);
711   }
712
713   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
714   public MockRestRequest formPostPairs(Object url, String...parameters) throws RestCallException {
715      return (MockRestRequest)super.formPostPairs(url, parameters);
716   }
717
718   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
719   public MockRestRequest get() throws RestCallException {
720      return (MockRestRequest)super.get();
721   }
722
723   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
724   public MockRestRequest get(Object url) throws RestCallException {
725      return (MockRestRequest)super.get(url);
726   }
727
728   /**
729    * Returns the current client-side REST request.
730    *
731    * <p>
732    * Note that this uses a {@link ThreadLocal} object for storage and so will not work on requests executed in
733    * separate threads such as when using {@link Future Futures}.
734    *
735    * @return The current client-side REST request, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
736    */
737   public HttpRequest getCurrentClientRequest() { return rreq.get(); }
738
739   /**
740    * Returns the current client-side REST response.
741    *
742    * <p>
743    * Note that this uses a {@link ThreadLocal} object for storage and so will not work on requests executed in
744    * separate threads such as when using {@link Future Futures}.
745    *
746    * @return The current client-side REST response, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
747    */
748   public MockRestResponse getCurrentClientResponse() { return rres.get(); }
749
750   /**
751    * Returns the current server-side REST request.
752    *
753    * <p>
754    * Note that this uses a {@link ThreadLocal} object for storage and so will not work on requests executed in
755    * separate threads such as when using {@link Future Futures}.
756    *
757    * @return The current server-side REST request, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
758    */
759   public MockServletRequest getCurrentServerRequest() { return sreq.get(); }
760
761   /**
762    * Returns the current server-side REST response.
763    *
764    * <p>
765    * Note that this uses a {@link ThreadLocal} object for storage and so will not work on requests executed in
766    * separate threads such as when using {@link Future Futures}.
767    *
768    * @return The current server-side REST response, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
769    */
770   public MockServletResponse getCurrentServerResponse() { return sres.get(); }
771
772   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
773   public HttpConnectionMetrics getMetrics() { return null; }
774
775   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
776   public int getSocketTimeout() { return Integer.MAX_VALUE; }
777
778   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
779   public MockRestRequest head(Object url) throws RestCallException {
780      return (MockRestRequest)super.head(url);
781   }
782
783   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
784   public boolean isOpen() { return true; }
785
786   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
787   public boolean isResponseAvailable(int timeout) throws IOException {
788      return true;
789   }
790
791   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
792   public boolean isStale() { return false; }
793
794   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
795   public MockRestRequest options(Object url) throws RestCallException {
796      return (MockRestRequest)super.options(url);
797   }
798
799   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
800   public MockRestRequest patch(Object url) throws RestCallException {
801      return (MockRestRequest)super.patch(url);
802   }
803
804   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
805   public MockRestRequest patch(Object url, Object body) throws RestCallException {
806      return (MockRestRequest)super.patch(url, body);
807   }
808
809   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
810   public MockRestRequest patch(Object url, String body, ContentType contentType) throws RestCallException {
811      return (MockRestRequest)super.patch(url, body, contentType);
812   }
813
814   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
815   public MockRestRequest post(Object url) throws RestCallException {
816      return (MockRestRequest)super.post(url);
817   }
818
819   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
820   public MockRestRequest post(Object url, Object body) throws RestCallException {
821      return (MockRestRequest)super.post(url, body);
822   }
823
824   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
825   public MockRestRequest post(Object url, String body, ContentType contentType) throws RestCallException {
826      return (MockRestRequest)super.post(url, body, contentType);
827   }
828
829   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
830   public MockRestRequest put(Object url) throws RestCallException {
831      return (MockRestRequest)super.put(url);
832   }
833
834   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
835   public MockRestRequest put(Object url, Object body) throws RestCallException {
836      return (MockRestRequest)super.put(url, body);
837   }
838
839   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
840   public MockRestRequest put(Object url, String body, ContentType contentType) throws RestCallException {
841      return (MockRestRequest)super.put(url, body, contentType);
842   }
843
844   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
845   public void receiveResponseEntity(HttpResponse response) throws HttpException, IOException {
846      InputStream is = new ByteArrayInputStream(sres.get().getContent());
847      var contentEncoding = response.getLastHeader("Content-Encoding");
848      if (nn(contentEncoding) && contentEncoding.getValue().equalsIgnoreCase("gzip"))
849         is = new GZIPInputStream(is);
850      response.setEntity(new InputStreamEntity(is));
851   }
852
853   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
854   public HttpResponse receiveResponseHeader() throws HttpException, IOException {
855      try {
856         var res = MockServletResponse.create();
857         restContext.execute(restObject, sreq.get(), res);
858
859         // If the status isn't set, something's broken.
860         if (res.getStatus() == 0)
861            throw new IllegalStateException("Response status was 0.");
862
863         // A bug in HttpClient causes an infinite loop if the response is less than 200.
864         // As a workaround, just add 1000 to the status code (which is better than an infinite loop).
865         if (res.getStatus() < 200)
866            res.setStatus(1000 + res.getStatus());
867
868         sres.set(res);
869
870         var response = new BasicHttpResponse(new BasicStatusLine(HttpVersion.HTTP_1_1, res.getStatus(), res.getMessage()));
871         res.getHeaders().forEach((k, v) -> {
872            for (var hv : v)
873               response.addHeader(k, hv);
874         });
875
876         return response;
877      } catch (Exception e) {
878         throw new HttpException(emptyIfNull(e.getMessage()), e);
879      }
880   }
881
882   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
883   public MockRestRequest request(RestOperation op) throws RestCallException {
884      return (MockRestRequest)super.request(op);
885   }
886
887   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
888   public MockRestRequest request(String method, Object url) throws RestCallException {
889      return (MockRestRequest)super.request(method, url);
890   }
891
892   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
893   public MockRestRequest request(String method, Object url, boolean hasBody) throws RestCallException {
894      return (MockRestRequest)super.request(method, url, hasBody);
895   }
896
897   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
898   public MockRestRequest request(String method, Object url, Object body) throws RestCallException {
899      return (MockRestRequest)super.request(method, url, body);
900   }
901
902   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
903   public void sendRequestEntity(HttpEntityEnclosingRequest request) throws HttpException, IOException {
904      byte[] body = {};
905      var entity = request.getEntity();
906      if (nn(entity)) {
907         var length = entity.getContentLength();
908         if (length < 0)
909            length = 1024;
910         var baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream((int)Math.min(length, 1024));
911         entity.writeTo(baos);
912         baos.flush();
913         body = baos.toByteArray();
914      }
915      sreq.get().content(body);
916   }
917
918   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
919   public void sendRequestHeader(HttpRequest request) throws HttpException, IOException {
920      try {
921         var rl = request.getRequestLine();
922         var path = rl.getUri();
923         var target = findTarget(request);
924
925         var req = findRestRequest(request);
926         rreq.set(req);
927         rres.remove();
928         sreq.remove();
929         sres.remove();
930
931         path = target + path;
932
933         var pr = new MockPathResolver(target, contextPath, servletPath, path, null);
934         if (nn(pr.getError()))
935            throw new IllegalStateException(pr.getError());
936
937         var r = MockServletRequest.create(request.getRequestLine().getMethod(), pr.getURI()).contextPath(pr.getContextPath()).servletPath(pr.getServletPath()).pathVars(pathVars).debug(isDebug());
938
939         for (var h : request.getAllHeaders())
940            r.header(h.getName(), h.getValue());
941
942         sreq.set(r);
943         sreq.get().applyOverrides(req);
944      } catch (Exception e) {
945         throw new HttpException(e.getMessage(), e);
946      }
947   }
948
949   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
950   public void setSocketTimeout(int timeout) {
951      // No-op: Mock implementation - full functionality not required
952   }
953
954   @Override /* Overridden from HttpClientConnection */
955   public void shutdown() throws IOException {
956      // No-op: Mock implementation - full functionality not required
957   }
958
959   /**
960    * Attempts to unwrap the request to find the underlying RestRequest object.
961    * Returns the same object if one of the low-level client methods are used (e.g. execute(HttpUriRequest)).
962    */
963   private HttpRequest findRestRequest(HttpRequest req) {
964      if (req instanceof RestRequestCreated req2)
965         return req2.getRestRequest();
966      if (req instanceof HttpRequestWrapper req3)
967         return findRestRequest(req3.getOriginal());
968      return req;
969   }
970
971   private static String findTarget(HttpRequest req) {
972      if (req instanceof HttpRequestWrapper req2) {
973         var httpHost = req2.getTarget();
974         if (nn(httpHost))
975            return httpHost.toURI();
976      }
977      return "http://localhost";
978   }
979
980   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
981   protected MockRestRequest createRequest(URI uri, String method, boolean hasBody) throws RestCallException {
982      return new MockRestRequest(this, uri, method, hasBody);
983   }
984
985   @Override /* Overridden from RestClient */
986   protected MockRestResponse createResponse(RestRequest req, HttpResponse httpResponse, Parser parser) throws RestCallException {
987      return new MockRestResponse(this, req, httpResponse, parser);
988   }
989
990   MockRestClient currentResponse(MockRestResponse value) {
991      rres.set(value);
992      return this;
993   }
994}
